creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 237241
devel/marisa-trie: update to 0.2.6

- bump PORTEPOCH as we change to upstreams version scheme (0.2.6)
   vs. our own (0.26)
 - hook up test suite
 - pacify portlint

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 i386 amd64 FreeBSD 13.1.
The dependent port chinese/librime builds.
The test suite passes.
Upstream does not provide a change log.
